en: My tummy's turnin and I'm feelin kinda homesick Too much pressure and I'm nervous That's.
ko: 배가 뒤집히고 향수병이 좀 나는 것 같아. 압박감이 너무 크고 긴장돼.

zhTW: 我的肚子在翻攪，有點想家，壓力太大，我好緊張
vi: Bung toi dang quay, va toi thay nho nha, qua nhieu ap luc va toi lo lang

en: when the taxi man turned on the radio And the Jay Z song was on And the Jay Z song.
ko: 그때 택시 기사가 라디오를 틀었어. 그리고 Jay-Z 노래가 나왔어.

en: was on And the Jay Z song was on So I put my hands up to play my song.
ko: Jay-Z 노래가 나왔어. Jay-Z 노래가 나왔어.

en: The butterflies fly away I'm noddin my head like yeah Movin my hips.
ko: 고개를 끄덕이며 '예' 하고. 엉덩이를 흔들며 '예' 하고.

en: like yeah I got my hands up to play my song And now I'm gonna be okay.
ko: 내 노래에 맞춰 손을 들었어. 나는 괜찮을 거야.

vi: Toi gio tay len de choi bai cua toi, va bay gio toi se on

en: it's a party in the U S A Get to the club in my taxi cab Everybody's.

en: lookin at me now Like who's that chick that's rockin kicks She gotta be from out of town.

en: So hard with my girls all around me It's definitely not a Nashville party Cause.

en: all I see is the letters I guess I never got the memo.
ko: 보이는 건 글자뿐이야. 난 연락을 못 받은 것 같아.
ja: 見えるのは文字だけ、連絡が来なかったみたい
